---
title: "Tessera: an alphabet of 3×3 binary grids"
image: tessera/thumb.png
date: 2026-06-12
description: "A complete constructed writing system built from the 102 symmetry classes of the 3×3 binary grid, with its own calligraphy and a working font family."
categories: [mathematics, design, typography]
---

**Tessera** is a constructed writing system whose characters are the 3×3 binary
pixel grids, classified under the symmetries of the square.

## The mathematics

A 3×3 binary grid has $2^9 = 512$ possible states. Two grids are considered
*the same character* if one can be obtained from the other by a rotation or
reflection — that is, by an element of the dihedral group $D_4$. The number of
distinct characters is the number of orbits of $D_4$ acting on the 512 grids,
which Burnside's lemma counts as

$$
\frac{1}{|D_4|}\sum_{g \in D_4} |\mathrm{Fix}(g)|
= \frac{1}{8}\left(2^9 + 2\cdot 2^3 + 2^5 + 2\cdot 2^6 + 2\cdot 2^5\right)
= \frac{816}{8} = 102.
$$

Those **102 orbits** are the characters of Tessera. Excluding the empty grid
and adding case and orientation variants, the full system maps onto **128
characters** covering the Latin alphabet, digits, punctuation, IPA symbols and
accented letters. Every orbit has a name — from CARDINAL and ROCKET to
BELLFLOWER, whose orbit contains the canonical glider from Conway's Game of
Life.

One pleasant invariant: the center pixel is the unique fixed point of $D_4$
acting on the grid cells, so *"is the center filled?"* is constant on every
orbit — it cleanly separates the alphabet into two families.

## Try it

The font is real: TrueType outlines generated programmatically from the same
JSON source of truth that produces all the documents below.

**[✒️ Type in Tessera — interactive specimen](tessera/docs/specimen.html)**
— a live demo with the full family (Regular, Bold, Italic, Bold Italic)
embedded. Type anything and watch it render.

## Documents

- [Periodic table of characters](tessera/docs/periodic.html) — all 102 orbits arranged by structure
- [Orbit explorer](tessera/docs/orbits.html) — every orbit with its full set of grid representatives
- [Calligraphic forms](tessera/docs/calli4.html) — the stroke-based rendering algorithm
- [Notes on the Tessera](tessera/docs/notes.html) — the full mathematical write-up

## Downloads

Install the fonts and type Tessera anywhere:

- [Tessera-Regular.ttf](tessera/fonts/Tessera-Regular.ttf)
- [Tessera-Bold.ttf](tessera/fonts/Tessera-Bold.ttf)
- [Tessera-Italic.ttf](tessera/fonts/Tessera-Italic.ttf)
- [Tessera-BoldItalic.ttf](tessera/fonts/Tessera-BoldItalic.ttf)
- [tessera.json](tessera/tessera.json) — the machine-readable source of truth (grids, orbits, names, codepoints)
